fields.In-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent facility: $125 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: $50 copay/visit
fields.Out-of-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent facility: $125 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: Not Covered
fields.In-Network Outpatient Surgery: Facility fee: Independent facility: $750 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Physician/surgeon fees: $60 copay/provider
fields.In-Network Inpatient Surgery: Facility fee: Day 1 - 3: $750 copay/day per admission after deductible; Day 4 and after: No Charge; Physician/surgeon fees: No charge after deductible
fields.In-Network Newborn Delivery: Routine OB or midwife: Visit 1 - 1: $40 copay/visit; Visit 2 and after: No Charge; Childbirth/Delivery Professional Services: No charge after deductible
fields.In-Network Major Diagnostics: Diagnostic test: Independent facility: $125 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Imaging: Independent facility: $350 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible
fields.In-Network Generic RX: 30-day supply: $25 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $62.50 copay/prescription / 30-day supply: $45 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $112.50 copay/prescription
fields.In-Network Tier 3 RX: 30-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible; 90-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible
fields.Deductible Explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay.
fields.In-Network RX: Value generic drugs (Tier 1): 30-day supply: $25 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $62.50 copay/prescription / Generic drugs (Tier 2): 30-day supply: $45 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $112.50 copay/prescription / Preferred brand drugs (Tier 3): 30-day supply: $115 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $287.50 copay/prescription / Non-Preferred brand drugs (Tier 4): 30-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible; 90-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible / Specialty drugs (Tier 5): 50% coinsurance after deductible (Retail only)
